title: sideritis antiatlantica
intro: Sideritis antiatlantica, also known as the Atlantic mountain tea or Atlantic rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis, native to the Iberian Peninsula and the Atlantic coast of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis antiatlantica include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress. Sideritis antiatlantica can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or in the form of capsules or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
